entries.label: BlueBubbles
entries.help: iMessage via the BlueBubbles mac app + REST API.

entries.label: BlueBubbles DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.bluebubbles.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: Discord
entries.help: very well supported right now.

entries.label: Discord Presence Activity
entries.help: Discord presence activity text (defaults to custom status).

entries.label: Discord Presence Activity Type
entries.help: Discord presence activity type (0=Playing,1=Streaming,2=Listening,3=Watching,4=Custom,5=Competing).

entries.label: Discord Presence Activity URL
entries.help: Discord presence streaming URL (required for activityType=1).

entries.label: Discord Allow Bot Messages
entries.help: Allow bot-authored messages to trigger Discord replies (default: false). Set "mentions" to only accept bot messages that mention the bot.

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Degraded Text
entries.help: Optional custom status text while runtime/model availability is degraded or unknown (idle).

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Enabled
entries.help: Enable automatic Discord bot presence updates based on runtime/model availability signals. When enabled: healthy=>online, degraded/unknown=>idle, exhausted/unavailable=>dnd.

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Exhausted Text
entries.help: Optional custom status text while runtime detects exhausted/unavailable model quota (dnd). Supports {reason} template placeholder.

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Healthy Text
entries.help: Optional custom status text while runtime is healthy (online). If omitted, falls back to static channels.discord.activity when set.

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Check Interval (ms)
entries.help: How often to evaluate Discord auto-presence state in milliseconds (default: 30000).

entries.label: Discord Auto Presence Min Update Interval (ms)
entries.help: Minimum time between actual Discord presence update calls in milliseconds (default: 15000). Prevents status spam on noisy state changes.

entries.label: Discord Native Commands
entries.help: Override native commands for Discord (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Discord Native Skill Commands
entries.help: Override native skill commands for Discord (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Discord Config Writes
entries.help: Allow Discord to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: Discord DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.discord.allowFrom=["*"] (legacy: channels.discord.dm.allowFrom).

entries.label: Discord DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.discord.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: Discord Draft Chunk Break Preference
entries.help: Preferred breakpoints for Discord draft chunks (paragraph | newline | sentence). Default: paragraph.

entries.label: Discord Draft Chunk Max Chars
entries.help: Target max size for a Discord stream preview chunk when channels.discord.streaming="block" (default: 800; clamped to channels.discord.textChunkLimit).

entries.label: Discord Draft Chunk Min Chars
entries.help: Minimum chars before emitting a Discord stream preview update when channels.discord.streaming="block" (default: 200).

entries.label: Discord EventQueue Listener Timeout (ms)
entries.help: Canonical Discord listener timeout control in ms for gateway normalization/enqueue handlers. Default is 120000 in OpenClaw; set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout.

entries.label: Discord EventQueue Max Concurrency
entries.help: Optional Discord EventQueue concurrency override (max concurrent handler executions). Set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.eventQueue.maxConcurrency.

entries.label: Discord EventQueue Max Queue Size
entries.help: Optional Discord EventQueue capacity override (max queued events before backpressure). Set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.eventQueue.maxQueueSize.

entries.label: Discord Inbound Worker Timeout (ms)
entries.help: Optional queued Discord inbound worker timeout in ms. This is separate from Carbon listener timeouts; defaults to 1800000 and can be disabled with 0. Set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs.

entries.label: Discord Guild Members Intent
entries.help: Enable the Guild Members privileged intent. Must also be enabled in the Discord Developer Portal. Default: false.

entries.label: Discord Presence Intent
entries.help: Enable the Guild Presences privileged intent. Must also be enabled in the Discord Developer Portal. Allows tracking user activities (e.g. Spotify). Default: false.

entries.label: Discord Max Lines Per Message
entries.help: Soft max line count per Discord message (default: 17).

entries.label: Discord PluralKit Enabled
entries.help: Resolve PluralKit proxied messages and treat system members as distinct senders.

entries.label: Discord PluralKit Token
entries.help: Optional PluralKit token for resolving private systems or members.

entries.label: Discord Proxy URL
entries.help: Proxy URL for Discord gateway + API requests (app-id lookup and allowlist resolution). Set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.proxy.

entries.label: Discord Retry Attempts
entries.help: Max retry attempts for outbound Discord API calls (default: 3).

entries.label: Discord Retry Jitter
entries.help: Jitter factor (0-1) applied to Discord retry delays.

entries.label: Discord Retry Max Delay (ms)
entries.help: Maximum retry delay cap in ms for Discord outbound calls.

entries.label: Discord Retry Min Delay (ms)
entries.help: Minimum retry delay in ms for Discord outbound calls.

entries.label: Discord Presence Status
entries.help: Discord presence status (online, dnd, idle, invisible).

entries.label: Discord Streaming Mode
entries.help: Unified Discord stream preview mode: "off" | "partial" | "block" | "progress". "progress" maps to "partial" on Discord. Legacy boolean/streamMode keys are auto-mapped.

entries.label: Discord Thread Binding Enabled
entries.help: Enable Discord thread binding features (/focus, bound-thread routing/delivery, and thread-bound subagent sessions). Overrides session.threadBindings.enabled when set.

entries.label: Discord Thread Binding Idle Timeout (hours)
entries.help: Inactivity window in hours for Discord thread-bound sessions (/focus and spawned thread sessions). Set 0 to disable idle auto-unfocus (default: 24). Overrides session.threadBindings.idleHours when set.

entries.label: Discord Thread Binding Max Age (hours)
entries.help: Optional hard max age in hours for Discord thread-bound sessions. Set 0 to disable hard cap (default: 0). Overrides session.threadBindings.maxAgeHours when set.

entries.label: Discord Thread-Bound ACP Spawn
entries.help: Allow /acp spawn to auto-create and bind Discord threads for ACP sessions (default: false; opt-in). Set true to enable thread-bound ACP spawns for this account/channel.

entries.label: Discord Thread-Bound Subagent Spawn
entries.help: Allow subagent spawns with thread=true to auto-create and bind Discord threads (default: false; opt-in). Set true to enable thread-bound subagent spawns for this account/channel.

entries.label: Discord Bot Token
entries.help: Discord bot token used for gateway and REST API authentication for this provider account. Keep this secret out of committed config and rotate immediately after any leak.

entries.label: Discord Component Accent Color
entries.help: Accent color for Discord component containers (hex). Set per account via channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor.

entries.label: Discord Voice Auto-Join
entries.help: Voice channels to auto-join on startup (list of guildId/channelId entries).

entries.label: Discord Voice DAVE Encryption
entries.help: Toggle DAVE end-to-end encryption for Discord voice joins (default: true in @discordjs/voice; Discord may require this).

entries.label: Discord Voice Decrypt Failure Tolerance
entries.help: Consecutive decrypt failures before DAVE attempts session recovery (passed to @discordjs/voice; default: 24).

entries.label: Discord Voice Enabled
entries.help: Enable Discord voice channel conversations (default: true). Omit channels.discord.voice to keep voice support disabled for the account.

entries.label: Discord Voice Text-to-Speech
entries.help: Optional TTS overrides for Discord voice playback (merged with messages.tts).

entries.label: Feishu
entries.help: 飞书/Lark enterprise messaging with doc/wiki/drive tools.

entries.label: Google Chat
entries.help: Google Workspace Chat app with HTTP webhook.

entries.label: iMessage
entries.help: this is still a work in progress.

entries.label: iMessage CLI Path
entries.help: Filesystem path to the iMessage bridge CLI binary used for send/receive operations. Set explicitly when the binary is not on PATH in service runtime environments.

entries.label: iMessage Config Writes
entries.help: Allow iMessage to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: iMessage DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.imessage.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: IRC
entries.help: classic IRC networks with DM/channel routing and pairing controls.

entries.label: IRC DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.irc.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: IRC NickServ Enabled
entries.help: Enable NickServ identify/register after connect (defaults to enabled when password is configured).

entries.label: IRC NickServ Password
entries.help: NickServ password used for IDENTIFY/REGISTER (sensitive).

entries.label: IRC NickServ Password File
entries.help: Optional file path containing NickServ password.

entries.label: IRC NickServ Register
entries.help: If true, send NickServ REGISTER on every connect. Use once for initial registration, then disable.

entries.label: IRC NickServ Register Email
entries.help: Email used with NickServ REGISTER (required when register=true).

entries.label: IRC NickServ Service
entries.help: NickServ service nick (default: NickServ).

entries.label: LINE
entries.help: LINE Messaging API webhook bot.

entries.label: Matrix
entries.help: open protocol; install the plugin to enable.

entries.label: Mattermost
entries.help: self-hosted Slack-style chat; install the plugin to enable.

entries.label: Microsoft Teams
entries.help: Teams SDK; enterprise support.

entries.label: MS Teams Config Writes
entries.help: Allow Microsoft Teams to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: Nextcloud Talk
entries.help: Self-hosted chat via Nextcloud Talk webhook bots.

entries.label: Nostr
entries.help: Decentralized protocol; encrypted DMs via NIP-04.

entries.label: QQ Bot
entries.help: connect to QQ via official QQ Bot API with group chat and direct message support.

entries.label: Signal
entries.help: signal-cli linked device; more setup (David Reagans: "Hop on Discord.").

entries.label: Signal Account
entries.help: Signal account identifier (phone/number handle) used to bind this channel config to a specific Signal identity. Keep this aligned with your linked device/session state.

entries.label: Signal Config Writes
entries.help: Allow Signal to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: Signal DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.signal.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: Slack
entries.help: supported (Socket Mode).

entries.label: Slack Allow Bot Messages
entries.help: Allow bot-authored messages to trigger Slack replies (default: false).

entries.label: Slack App Token
entries.help: Slack app-level token used for Socket Mode connections and event transport when enabled. Use least-privilege app scopes and store this token as a secret.

entries.label: Slack Bot Token
entries.help: Slack bot token used for standard chat actions in the configured workspace. Keep this credential scoped and rotate if workspace app permissions change.

entries.label: Slack Interactive Replies
entries.help: Enable agent-authored Slack interactive reply directives (`[[slack_buttons: ...]]`, `[[slack_select: ...]]`). Default: false.

entries.label: Slack Native Commands
entries.help: Override native commands for Slack (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Slack Native Skill Commands
entries.help: Override native skill commands for Slack (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Slack Config Writes
entries.help: Allow Slack to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: Slack DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.slack.allowFrom=["*"] (legacy: channels.slack.dm.allowFrom).

entries.label: Slack DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.slack.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: Slack Exec Approvals
entries.help: Slack-native exec approval routing and approver authorization. When unset, OpenClaw auto-enables DM-first native approvals if approvers can be resolved for this workspace account.

entries.label: Slack Exec Approval Agent Filter
entries.help: Optional allowlist of agent IDs eligible for Slack exec approvals, for example `["main", "ops-agent"]`. Use this to keep approval prompts scoped to the agents you actually operate from Slack.

entries.label: Slack Exec Approval Approvers
entries.help: Slack user IDs allowed to approve exec requests for this workspace account. Use Slack user IDs or user targets such as `U123`, `user:U123`, or `<@U123>`. If you leave this unset, OpenClaw falls back to commands.ownerAllowFrom when possible.

entries.label: Slack Exec Approvals Enabled
entries.help: Controls Slack native exec approvals for this account: unset or "auto" enables DM-first native approvals when approvers can be resolved, true forces native approvals on, and false disables them.

entries.label: Slack Exec Approval Session Filter
entries.help: Optional session-key filters matched as substring or regex-style patterns before Slack approval routing is used. Use narrow patterns so Slack approvals only appear for intended sessions.

entries.label: Slack Exec Approval Target
entries.help: Controls where Slack approval prompts are sent: "dm" sends to approver DMs (default), "channel" sends to the originating Slack chat/thread, and "both" sends to both. Channel delivery exposes the command text to the chat, so only use it in trusted channels.

entries.label: Slack Native Streaming
entries.help: Enable native Slack text streaming (chat.startStream/chat.appendStream/chat.stopStream) when channels.slack.streaming is partial (default: true).

entries.label: Slack Streaming Mode
entries.help: Unified Slack stream preview mode: "off" | "partial" | "block" | "progress". Legacy boolean/streamMode keys are auto-mapped.

entries.label: Slack Thread History Scope
entries.help: Scope for Slack thread history context ("thread" isolates per thread; "channel" reuses channel history).

entries.label: Slack Thread Parent Inheritance
entries.help: If true, Slack thread sessions inherit the parent channel transcript (default: false).

entries.label: Slack Thread Initial History Limit
entries.help: Maximum number of existing Slack thread messages to fetch when starting a new thread session (default: 20, set to 0 to disable).

entries.label: Slack User Token
entries.help: Optional Slack user token for workflows requiring user-context API access beyond bot permissions. Use sparingly and audit scopes because this token can carry broader authority.

entries.label: Slack User Token Read Only
entries.help: When true, treat configured Slack user token usage as read-only helper behavior where possible. Keep enabled if you only need supplemental reads without user-context writes.

entries.label: Synology Chat
entries.help: Connect your Synology NAS Chat to OpenClaw with full agent capabilities.

entries.label: Telegram
entries.help: simplest way to get started — register a bot with @BotFather and get going.

entries.label: Telegram API Root URL
entries.help: Custom Telegram Bot API root URL. Use for self-hosted Bot API servers (https://github.com/tdlib/telegram-bot-api) or reverse proxies in regions where api.telegram.org is blocked.

entries.label: Telegram Auto Topic Label
entries.help: Auto-rename DM forum topics on first message using LLM. Default: true. Set to false to disable, or use object form { enabled: true, prompt: '...' } for custom prompt.

entries.label: Telegram Auto Topic Label Enabled
entries.help: Whether auto topic labeling is enabled. Default: true.

entries.label: Telegram Auto Topic Label Prompt
entries.help: Custom prompt for LLM-based topic naming. The user message is appended after the prompt.

entries.label: Telegram Bot Token
entries.help: Telegram bot token used to authenticate Bot API requests for this account/provider config. Use secret/env substitution and rotate tokens if exposure is suspected.

entries.label: Telegram Inline Buttons
entries.help: Enable Telegram inline button components for supported command and interaction surfaces. Disable if your deployment needs plain-text-only compatibility behavior.

entries.label: Telegram Native Commands
entries.help: Override native commands for Telegram (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Telegram Native Skill Commands
entries.help: Override native skill commands for Telegram (bool or "auto").

entries.label: Telegram Config Writes
entries.help: Allow Telegram to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: Telegram Custom Commands
entries.help: Additional Telegram bot menu commands (merged with native; conflicts ignored).

entries.label: Telegram DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.telegram.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approvals
entries.help: Telegram-native exec approval routing and approver authorization. When unset, OpenClaw auto-enables DM-first native approvals if approvers can be resolved for the selected bot account.

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approval Agent Filter
entries.help: Optional allowlist of agent IDs eligible for Telegram exec approvals, for example `["main", "ops-agent"]`. Use this to keep approval prompts scoped to the agents you actually operate from Telegram.

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approval Approvers
entries.help: Telegram user IDs allowed to approve exec requests for this bot account. Use numeric Telegram user IDs. If you leave this unset, OpenClaw falls back to numeric owner IDs inferred from channels.telegram.allowFrom and direct-message defaultTo when possible.

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approvals Enabled
entries.help: Controls Telegram native exec approvals for this account: unset or "auto" enables DM-first native approvals when approvers can be resolved, true forces native approvals on, and false disables them.

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approval Session Filter
entries.help: Optional session-key filters matched as substring or regex-style patterns before Telegram approval routing is used. Use narrow patterns so Telegram approvals only appear for intended sessions.

entries.label: Telegram Exec Approval Target
entries.help: Controls where Telegram approval prompts are sent: "dm" sends to approver DMs (default), "channel" sends to the originating Telegram chat/topic, and "both" sends to both. Channel delivery exposes the command text to the chat, so only use it in trusted groups/topics.

entries.label: Telegram autoSelectFamily
entries.help: Override Node autoSelectFamily for Telegram (true=enable, false=disable).

entries.label: Telegram Dangerously Allow Private Network
entries.help: Dangerous opt-in for trusted fake-IP or transparent-proxy environments where Telegram media downloads resolve api.telegram.org to private/internal/special-use addresses.

entries.label: Telegram Retry Attempts
entries.help: Max retry attempts for outbound Telegram API calls (default: 3).

entries.label: Telegram Retry Jitter
entries.help: Jitter factor (0-1) applied to Telegram retry delays.

entries.label: Telegram Retry Max Delay (ms)
entries.help: Maximum retry delay cap in ms for Telegram outbound calls.

entries.label: Telegram Retry Min Delay (ms)
entries.help: Minimum retry delay in ms for Telegram outbound calls.

entries.label: Telegram Silent Error Replies
entries.help: When true, Telegram bot replies marked as errors are sent silently (no notification sound). Default: false.

entries.label: Telegram Streaming Mode
entries.help: Unified Telegram stream preview mode: "off" | "partial" | "block" | "progress" (default: "partial"). "progress" maps to "partial" on Telegram. Legacy boolean/streamMode keys are auto-mapped.

entries.label: Telegram Thread Binding Enabled
entries.help: Enable Telegram conversation binding features (/focus, /unfocus, /agents, and /session idle|max-age). Overrides session.threadBindings.enabled when set.

entries.label: Telegram Thread Binding Idle Timeout (hours)
entries.help: Inactivity window in hours for Telegram bound sessions. Set 0 to disable idle auto-unfocus (default: 24). Overrides session.threadBindings.idleHours when set.

entries.label: Telegram Thread Binding Max Age (hours)
entries.help: Optional hard max age in hours for Telegram bound sessions. Set 0 to disable hard cap (default: 0). Overrides session.threadBindings.maxAgeHours when set.

entries.label: Telegram Thread-Bound ACP Spawn
entries.help: Allow ACP spawns with thread=true to auto-bind Telegram current conversations when supported.

entries.label: Telegram Thread-Bound Subagent Spawn
entries.help: Allow subagent spawns with thread=true to auto-bind Telegram current conversations when supported.

entries.label: Telegram API Timeout (seconds)
entries.help: Max seconds before Telegram API requests are aborted (default: 500 per grammY).

entries.label: Tlon
entries.help: decentralized messaging on Urbit; install the plugin to enable.

entries.label: Twitch
entries.help: Twitch chat integration

entries.label: WhatsApp
entries.help: works with your own number; recommend a separate phone + eSIM.

entries.label: WhatsApp Config Writes
entries.help: Allow WhatsApp to write config in response to channel events/commands (default: true).

entries.label: WhatsApp Message Debounce (ms)
entries.help: Debounce window (ms) for batching rapid consecutive messages from the same sender (0 to disable).

entries.label: WhatsApp DM Policy
entries.help: Direct message access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.whatsapp.allowFrom=["*"].

entries.label: WhatsApp Self-Phone Mode
entries.help: Same-phone setup (bot uses your personal WhatsApp number).

entries.label: Zalo
entries.help: Vietnam-focused messaging platform with Bot API.

entries.label: Zalo Personal
entries.help: Zalo personal account via QR code login.
